title: Bridge Essay: Insula-cortico-subcortical networks predict interoceptive awareness and stress resilience.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Insula-cortico-subcortical networks predict interoceptive awareness and stress resilience.** — Asian J Psychiatr (2024). DOI: 10.1016/j.ajp.2024.103991. PMID: 38484483. BACKGROUND: Interoception, the neural sensing of visceral signals, and interoceptive awareness (IA), the conscious perception of interoception, are crucial for life survival functions and mental health. Resilience, the capacity to overcome adversity, has been associated with reduced interoceptive disturbances.
